song.title: Christ Has Come to Be Life
song.author: Phil Bradley
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P B V3 P
song.lyrics: [V1] .G C G C Christ has come to be life, . G C G C The processed divine trinity. .G C G C God the Father's the source, . G C G C A fountain emerging to be . D C G God the Son as a gushing up spring, . D C G In the Spirit - a river for life-imparting. . Em C Oh, how can this miracle be, . C D The triune God flowing in me? [P] . G C G C Oh! I've got rivers of life . G C G C Flowing out of my innermost being. . G C G C Oh! I've got rivers of life . G C G Flowing out of my innermost being. [C] .G C D G C D G As this life flows through me, I'm supplied abundantly. .Em C G D Em C G D His life nullifies sin! Power springs now from within! .Em C G D G-C-G-C To be free, overcoming spontaneously. --- [V2] Yet this life though it frees, is not meant for mere victory. God is full of intent, and never could flow aimlessly. So this life has a totality, a consummate issue encompassing me. Life moves and life grows, life shapes as it flows. Now I share in this life's destiny. [B] We'll abide mutually, God and man revealed to be Lamb, Wife, Spirit, and Bride. Come! Drink! And riverside, Grows the tree, our enjoyment for eternity! [V3] So I've no cause to frown as one who's received this zoe. I know life runs its course and triumphs inevitably. I'm required just to stay in the flow. If I do the drinking then God gives the growth. So there's joy in my heart, and a spring in my step, And a smile on my face as I sing.
